userManagement.title: User Management
userManagement.subtitle: Manage admin users and invitations
userManagement.loadError: Failed to load users. Please try again.

confirmDeactivate.title: Deactivate User
confirmDeactivate.message: Are you sure you want to deactivate {{name}}? They will no longer be able to log in.

confirmCancelInvitation.title: Cancel Invitation
confirmCancelInvitation.message: Are you sure you want to cancel the invitation for {{email}}?

stuckEmails.title: Stuck / failed emails
stuckEmails.empty: No stuck or failed emails — all clear.

upload.clickToUpload: Click to upload or drag and drop
upload.fileRequirements: JPEG, PNG or WebP (max 50MB per file, {{limit}} files per upload)
upload.processingHint: Files are uploaded. PicPeak is now generating thumbnails and reading metadata. You can leave this page — work continues in the background.
upload.replaceByName: Replace existing photos with same name
upload.someFilesSkipped: Only {{allowed}} more files can be added (limit {{limit}})
upload.tooManyFiles: Maximum {{limit}} files can be uploaded at once
upload.limitReached: Upload limit reached ({{limit}} files per batch)

archives.title: Archives
archives.subtitle: Manage archived photo galleries
archives.storageInfo: Archives are stored permanently unless manually deleted. Consider implementing a retention policy to manage storage costs.
archives.confirmRestore: Are you sure you want to restore this archive? The event will become active again.
archives.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this archive? This action cannot be undone.

auth.wrongPassword: Incorrect password. Please check your password and try again.
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed login attempts. Please try again later.
auth.passwordHint: The password was provided by the event organizer. Contact them if you don't have it.

gallery.contactOrganizer: Please contact the event organizer if you need access to these photos.
gallery.downloadBefore: Download your photos before they're no longer available.
gallery.selectPhotosHint: Tip: Use Ctrl+Click (Cmd+Click on Mac) to quickly select multiple photos
gallery.thankYouMessage: For being part of our story and making our special day unforgettable.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first!

guestRecovery.codeSent: Check your inbox for a verification code.
guestRecovery.requestError: Could not send code. Try again.
guestRecovery.title: Recover your picks
guestRecovery.emailStepDescription: Enter the email you used before. We will send a 6-digit verification code.
guestRecovery.codeStepDescription: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your email.

guestPrompt.title: Welcome — what's your name?
guestPrompt.description: Your picks will be saved under this name so the photographer knows which photos you love.

footer.forgetMeConfirm: Your name and selections will be removed from this gallery.

categories.title: Photo Categories
categories.noEventSpecificCategories: No event-specific categories. Global categories are available by default.
categories.noCategoriesYet: No categories yet. Create your first category to organize photos.
categories.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
categories.categoryHeroHint: If no cover photo is set for a category, the default hero photo will be used.
categories.enableDownloadsTitle: Click to enable downloads for this category
categories.disableDownloadsTitle: Click to disable downloads for this category

events.title: Events
events.welcomeMessagePlaceholder: Welcome to our special day! Feel free to download and share these memories...
events.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive this event? This action cannot be undone.
events.sourceModeHelp: Use managed mode for direct uploads or point to a mounted /external-media folder when using local storage.
events.externalFolderHint: These folders are read from the /external-media mount inside your container or host.
events.externalFolderRequired: Please select an external folder before saving.
events.shareWithGuests: Share this link with guests. They'll need the password to access the gallery.
events.shareWithGuestsPublic: Share this link with guests. No password is required for this gallery.
events.creationEmailResent: Creation email has been queued for sending
events.archivingInfo: Archiving will create a ZIP file of all photos and remove the gallery from public access.
events.organizeCategoriesInfo: Organize your photos into categories. Categories help guests navigate and find specific types of photos.
events.categoriesTip: Tip: Categories are specific to each event. You can create custom categories like "Ceremony", "Reception", "Portraits", etc.
events.requirePasswordToggleHelp: Disable this if you want to share the gallery without a password. Anyone with the link will be able to view the photos.
events.publicGalleryWarning: Public galleries are accessible to anyone with the link. Consider enabling download watermarks and monitoring activity.
events.passwordHelperText: You can use dates like "04.07.2025" or any text with 6+ characters

passwordReset.title: Reset Gallery Password
passwordReset.description: Set a new password for {{eventName}}, or leave both fields empty to have one auto-generated.
passwordReset.helperText: Use 6+ characters, or leave blank to auto-generate
passwordReset.sendEmailHelp: Notify the host about the password change
passwordReset.warning: Note: The old password will no longer work. Make sure to share the new password with the host.
passwordReset.emailSentNote: An email notification has been sent to the host.
passwordReset.saveSecurelyNote: Important: Save this password securely. It cannot be recovered once you close this window.
passwordReset.errorMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

events.noExpirationHelp: This gallery will remain active until manually archived.
events.photoCapHelp: Maximum number of photos allowed. 0 = unlimited
events.allowUserUploadsHelp: Enable guests to upload their own photos to this gallery
events.allowUserUploadsDescription: Enable guests to upload their own photos to this gallery
events.selectCategory: Select a category for user uploads
events.uploadCategoryHelp: All user-uploaded photos will be added to this category
events.protectionInfo: Protection features help prevent unauthorized downloads but cannot block all methods.
events.heroLogoInfo: These settings apply when the gallery uses the Hero layout. You can hide the logo or customize its size and position.
events.eventCustomLogoDescription: Upload a custom logo for this event. This overrides the global branding logo for this gallery only.
events.heroPhotoHelp: Select a default hero photo for the gallery. You can override this per category.
events.heroImageAnchorDescription: Click on the image to set the focal point for cropping.
events.publishConfirm: This will make the gallery accessible and send the notification email to the client. Continue?

publishDialog.title: Publish gallery
publishDialog.descriptionWithEmail: Publishing "{{eventName}}" makes the gallery accessible and sends the notification email to {{customerEmail}}.
publishDialog.descriptionNoEmail: Publishing "{{eventName}}" makes the gallery accessible. No customer email is set, so no notification will be sent.
publishDialog.passwordHelp: Re-type the password set at creation (or pick a new one). The email includes this exact text; the backend re-hashes it so the gallery login still works.
publishDialog.errorMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long.

duplicateDialog.title: Duplicate gallery
duplicateDialog.description: Creates a new draft gallery that inherits the branding, behaviour, feedback, and category configuration from "{{sourceEventName}}". Photos, password, and share tokens are NOT carried over.
duplicateDialog.eventDateHelp: Leave blank to use a random suffix in the gallery URL. Expiration is recomputed from this date plus the source gallery's expiration window.
duplicateDialog.customerNamePlaceholder: Optional — fill in later if unknown

events.draftBanner: This gallery is in draft mode. Upload your photos, then publish when ready.
events.subtitle: Manage your photo galleries and events

bulkDelete.warning: This will permanently delete the selected events, all their photos, archives, and audit logs. This action cannot be undone.
bulkDelete.confirmHelp: A typed confirmation prevents accidental deletions and isn't affected by browser autofill or passkey shortcuts.
bulkDelete.processing_one: Deleting {{count}} events. This may take a few minutes — please don't close this window.
bulkDelete.processing_other: Deleting {{count}} events. This may take a few minutes — please don't close this window.

events.newPasswordRequired: Please set a password before enabling protection.
events.deleteEventConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this event?
events.guestsCannotAccessGallery: Guests can no longer access the gallery. Consider archiving this event.
events.warningEmailsHaveBeenSent: Warning emails have been sent to the customer.
events.customCssTemplateDesc: Apply a custom CSS template to style the gallery with unique visual effects.

rename.title: Rename Event
rename.resendEmail: Resend invitation email with new gallery link
rename.emailTo: Send updated gallery access email to
rename.warning2: Old URLs will automatically redirect to the new URL

events.allowPresignedDownload: Allow direct S3 download (no watermark, S3 mode only)
events.externalImportInfo: All pictures from the selected folder will be imported.

promoBanner.title: Promotional Banner
promoBanner.help: Choose how this gallery handles the promotional banner. "Inherit" uses your global default; "Custom" overrides it for this event; "Off" hides it entirely.
promoBanner.placeholder: Markdown content (e.g. **Special offer:** [book your next session](https://example.com))

ogShare.title: Use hero photo as social-share preview
ogShare.help: When this gallery URL is shared on WhatsApp, Facebook, Slack, etc., the link preview will show the hero photo above. The thumbnail is fetched unauthenticated by link-preview crawlers — anyone with the URL effectively makes this image public. Off by default; pick a hero you are comfortable surfacing publicly before enabling.
ogShare.heroRequired: Pick a hero photo above first — this option uses it as the WhatsApp / Facebook / Slack preview image.

general.title: General
general.siteUrlHelp: Used for generating gallery links in emails
general.maxFilesPerUploadHelp: Maximum number of photos allowed in a single upload batch (1-{{max}}).
general.maxUploadBatchSizeHelp: Maximum size per upload request. Lower this if behind a reverse proxy with request size limits (e.g. Cloudflare: 100MB).
general.enableShortGalleryUrlsHelp: Removes the event slug from new share links while keeping existing links working.
general.useOriginalFilenamesHelp: When on, single-photo and ZIP downloads use the original camera filename (e.g. DSC_1234.jpg) instead of the sanitized name. Storage is unchanged; duplicates in the same event get a numeric suffix.
general.defaultLanguageHelp: Language shown to guests before login
general.dateFormatHelp: How dates are displayed in emails and throughout the application
general.accountUsernameHelp: Displayed in the admin interface and used in activity logs.
general.accountUsernameLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
general.accountEmailHelp: Used for login and receiving security notifications.

publicSite.title: Public Landing Page
publicSite.subtitle: Publish a customized landing page for guests when they visit your domain.
publicSite.htmlPlaceholder: Provide the HTML markup for your landing page hero, sections, and calls to action.
publicSite.htmlHelp: Raw HTML is sanitized on save. Unsafe tags, inline scripts, and disallowed attributes are removed automatically. Tokens such as {{company_name}}, {{company_tagline}}, and {{support_email}} will be substituted with values from Branding settings.
publicSite.cssPlaceholder: Optional CSS overrides to adjust layout, colors, or typography.
publicSite.cssHelp: Imports and JavaScript URLs are stripped. Use standard CSS selectors to override the default styling.
publicSite.saveError: Failed to save public site settings.
publicSite.resetSuccess: Public site template reset to defaults.
publicSite.resetError: Failed to reset public site template.
publicSite.previewDisabled: Enable the public site to see the live preview.
publicSite.sanitizationNotice: Scripts, embedded frames, and unsafe attributes are removed before publishing. Only safe HTML, links, and images are allowed.
publicSite.htmlRequired: Provide HTML content before enabling the public site.

storage.storageLimitHelper: Set a limit for photo storage usage. This limit is advisory and will highlight when reached.
storage.softLimitHelper: Enter the preferred maximum storage usage in gigabytes.
storage.diskMetricsUnavailable: Disk metrics are not available in Docker Desktop or virtualized environments.
storage.invalidSoftLimit: Enter a valid number for the limit.
storage.limitNotEnforced: This limit is advisory only and is not enforced automatically.
storage.diskOverrideEnvNote: Disk capacity is controlled by environment variables and cannot be edited here.
storage.diskOverrideSettingsHelp: Set custom capacity values when Docker reports unrealistic figures.
storage.overrideCapacityHelper: Leave blank to use the automatic reading.
storage.overrideAvailableHelper: Optional. Leave blank to calculate from total capacity minus used storage.
storage.capacityRequiredForAvailable: Enter a total capacity before setting available space.
storage.availableExceedsCapacity: Available space cannot exceed the total capacity.

security.title: Security
security.passwordComplexityHelp: Security level required for gallery passwords
security.complexityVeryStrong: Very Strong (12+ chars, all character types)
security.maxLoginAttemptsHelp: Maximum failed login attempts per IP before lockout
security.attemptWindowMinutesHelp: How long to look back when counting failed login attempts
security.lockoutDurationMinutesHelp: How long the gallery or account stays locked after too many failures

categories.title: Categories
categories.aboutText: Global categories are available for all events. You can also create event-specific categories when editing individual events. Categories help organize photos and allow guests to filter photos by type in the gallery view.

photoDimensions.title: Photo Dimensions
photoDimensions.description: Backfill missing width/height for photos uploaded before dimension tracking was added. Required for Masonry and Mosaic layouts.

updateNotifications.title: Update Notifications
updateNotifications.description: Receive email notifications when new versions of PicPeak are available.
updateNotifications.enableEmailsDesc: Send email to admins when a new version is available
updateNotifications.recipientsHelper: Comma-separated email addresses. Leave empty to send to all admin users.

events.title: Event Creation
events.requiredFieldsDescription: Configure which contact fields are required when creating new events.
events.requireCustomerNameHelp: Customer name must be provided for new events
events.requireCustomerEmailHelp: Customer email must be provided for new events
events.requireAdminEmailHelp: Admin email must be provided for new events
events.requireEventDateHelp: Event date must be provided when creating events
events.eventDateWarning: Gallery URLs will use random identifiers instead of dates
events.requireExpirationHelp: Galleries must have an expiration date
events.expirationWarning: Galleries without expiration will remain active until manually archived
events.noteText: These settings only affect new event creation. Existing events are not affected. Default behavior requires all fields.
events.defaultRequirePasswordHelp: Pre-check "Require password" when creating new events. Disable for quicker creation of public galleries.
events.showGalleryFilterBarHelp: Display the search-by-filename and sort controls above grid-layout galleries. Disable for a cleaner layout.
events.enablePhoneFieldHelp: Adds an optional phone number input to the event form. Useful for downstream automations like WhatsApp delivery via n8n. Always optional even when enabled.
events.defaultFeedbackEnabledHelp: Pre-check "Guest Feedback" when creating new events. Individual feedback options (likes, ratings, comments) can still be customised per event.

imageSecurity.title: Image Protection
imageSecurity.loadError: Failed to load image security settings
imageSecurity.defaultProtectionHelp: These settings apply to all new events. Individual events can override these defaults.
imageSecurity.enableCanvas: Enable canvas rendering by default (advanced protection)
imageSecurity.rateLimitingHelp: Limit how many images can be requested to prevent scraping.
imageSecurity.infoText: These protection features help prevent casual downloading and copying but cannot block all methods. Determined users may still find ways to capture images. Consider using watermarks and legal agreements for comprehensive protection.

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.description: Manage words that should be filtered or blocked in comments
moderation.wordRequired: Please enter a word to filter
moderation.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this word filter?
moderation.lowDescription: Word is flagged for review but not automatically blocked
moderation.moderateDescription: Comment requires manual approval before being visible
moderation.highDescription: Comment is automatically hidden and requires admin review
moderation.blockDescription: Comment is rejected immediately and cannot be submitted

thumbnails.title: Thumbnails
thumbnails.dimensionsHelp: Configure the size and quality of auto-generated thumbnails. Higher values produce better-looking previews but increase storage and load times.
thumbnails.qualityHelp: 1-100, higher = better quality but larger files
thumbnails.fitHelp: How images are resized to fit the thumbnail dimensions. "Cover" crops to fill, "Contain" fits within bounds.
thumbnails.regenerateHelp: After changing thumbnail settings, regenerate all existing thumbnails to apply the new configuration. This runs in the background and may take a while for large galleries.
thumbnails.lightboxHelp: When enabled, the lightbox loads an aspect-preserved ~1920px JPEG (typically 200–500 KB) instead of the full original (often 5–12 MB). Originals are still served when guests click Download. Costs roughly one extra preview file per photo on disk; previews are generated lazily on first open and stored in /previews.
thumbnails.lightboxToggle: Use medium-resolution previews in the lightbox
thumbnails.lightboxToggleHelp: Off by default. Flip on after deciding the perceived-perf win is worth the extra disk usage.
thumbnails.infoText: Thumbnails are smaller preview images generated from your originals. Increasing the size or quality improves how photos look in the gallery grid but uses more storage and bandwidth. After changing settings, use "Regenerate All Thumbnails" to update existing photos.
thumbnails.fitRecommendation: Recommendation: use "Inside" for masonry / mosaic / justified layouts (preserves aspect ratio); "Cover" for uniform 1:1 grid tiles.

seo.title: SEO & Robots
seo.allowIndexingHelp: When disabled, all crawlers are blocked via robots.txt. Recommended off for private photo platforms.
seo.sitemapUrlHelp: Optional. Added to robots.txt if provided.
seo.blockAiCrawlersHelp: Prevent AI training bots from accessing your content.
seo.blockSocialBotsHelp: Prevent link previews on Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, etc.
seo.metaNoindexHelp: Tells search engines not to index pages (HTML-level, complements robots.txt).
seo.metaNofollowHelp: Tells search engines not to follow links on pages.
seo.metaNoaiHelp: Signals that content should not be used for AI training.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.umamiUrlHelp: The URL of your Umami instance (e.g., https://analytics.yourdomain.com)
analytics.websiteIdHelp: Your Umami website ID (found in Umami dashboard)
analytics.shareUrlHelp: Public share URL for embedding the full dashboard (create in Umami)
analytics.umamiInfoText: Umami is a privacy-focused, open-source analytics platform. It tracks page views, unique visitors, and custom events without using cookies.
analytics.backendAnalyticsText: The system also tracks basic analytics server-side for security and performance monitoring.
analytics.privacyText: IP addresses are hashed for privacy. No personal data is stored. Analytics data is retained for 90 days.

apiTokens.title: API Tokens
apiTokens.subtitle: Long-lived bearer tokens for the public /api/v1 surface — n8n integrations, custom apps, scripts. Tokens act as the admin user that minted them, intersected with the chosen scopes.
apiTokens.copyNow: Copy this token now — it will not be shown again.
apiTokens.name: Name
apiTokens.scopeHint: admin > write > read. A read-only token cannot mutate, even if its owner is super_admin.
apiTokens.confirmRevoke: Revoke "{{name}}"? Existing integrations using this token will start getting 401.
apiTokens.empty: No tokens yet. Generate one above to get started.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: POST event notifications to your URL the moment something happens — gallery published, photo uploaded, event archived, etc. Signed with HMAC-SHA256 in the X-PicPeak-Signature header.
webhooks.piiNotice: event.* payloads include customer contact info (name, email, phone) and the gallery share token if you have stored them. Only point webhooks at receivers you trust — they have everything needed to message the customer or open the gallery.
webhooks.copyNow: Copy this signing secret now — it will not be shown again.
webhooks.name: Name
webhooks.empty: No webhooks yet. Create one above to start receiving event notifications.
webhooks.filterHelp: Dot-path → expected value. All keys must match (AND). Use an array for "any of".
webhooks.templateHelp: Replaces the default JSON envelope as the request body. ${dot.path} substitution from the payload only — no logic, no expressions.
webhooks.confirmDelete: Delete "{{name}}"? Pending deliveries are also removed.

features.title: Features
features.intro: Turn product surfaces on or off. Enabled features appear in the left navigation and become available to your team. Some features are still in beta — flip them on to try them, off to hide them.
features.notYetAvailable: Not yet available — this toggle activates when the feature ships.
features.sidebarHidden: No sidebar item — runs in the background

preview.title: Sidebar preview
preview.legend: Green tinted items are controlled by toggles above.

galleries.title: Galleries
galleries.description: The core PicPeak surface. Always available.
galleries.locked: Galleries are the foundation of PicPeak and can't be turned off.

incomingMail.title: Incoming mail
incomingMail.description: Poll a dedicated mailbox (IMAP) every minute and drop invoice attachments into Accounting → Incoming invoices. Configure the mailbox under Settings → Email.

reminderEmails.title: Reminder Emails
reminderEmails.description: Automatic pre-event nudge to customers N days before their event date. Per-category templates (concert, corporate, wedding, …) editable in Settings → Reminder templates; per-event override on the event detail page.

messaging.title: Messaging
messaging.description: In-app threads with guests, attached to a gallery. Email is genuinely fine for most teams — this is for studios that want everything in one place.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Admin-only calendar showing events, logged hours, and pending quotes/contracts in one view. Drag-create hours directly on the calendar.

calendarBooking.title: Customer booking
calendarBooking.description: Let customers see free slots on a public calendar and book directly. Coming soon.

quotes.title: Quotes
quotes.description: Send line-itemed quotes to clients. They can accept or decline from a public link; payment is tracked manually.

bills.title: Invoices
bills.description: Generate an invoice from any accepted quote. Mark paid manually — no payment processor integration.

taxReport.title: Tax export
taxReport.description: Period-scoped revenue list with net + VAT breakdown grouped by VAT rate. Export as PDF (landscape, company letterhead) or CSV for your accountant. Cancelled invoices stay visible for a gap-free audit trail but are excluded from totals.
taxReport.requiresBills: Enable Bills first — the tax report reads from your invoices.
taxReport.requiresAccounting: Enable Accounting first — Tax export lives in the Accounting section.

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.description: A dedicated Accounting area, separate from CRM. Turn this on, then enable the sub-features below (Tax export, Incoming invoices). VAT / tax treatment is guidance only — verify with your Treuhänder before relying on it.
accounting.requiredByBills: On automatically because Invoices is enabled — invoice VAT settings live in the Accounting section.

incomingInvoices.title: Incoming invoices
incomingInvoices.description: Capture received supplier invoices (upload or phone/tablet camera), categorize expenses, and re-bill costs to clients on the relevant event with a contract-driven markup.
incomingInvoices.requiresAccounting: Enable Accounting first — Incoming invoices live in the Accounting section.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.description: Internal expenses (mileage, per-diem, cash) booked to an event or the company, with optional proof. Separate from incoming supplier invoices.
expenses.requiresAccounting: Enable Accounting first — Expenses live in the Accounting section.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Storage usage, gallery views, download counts, and per-event stats.

userManagement.title: User Management
userManagement.description: Multi-admin support with role-based permissions. Turn off if you're a single-operator studio.
userManagement.warning: Existing user accounts stay valid; the admin UI for managing them will be hidden until you re-enable this.

customerPortal.title: Customer Accounts
customerPortal.description: Persistent customer logins. Recurring clients see all their assigned galleries from one place — no per-event passwords. Customers log in at /customer/login and you manage them under CRM → Accounts.

clients.title: CRM
clients.description: Master switch for the CRM sidebar section. Off hides the section and every sub-feature below regardless of their individual toggles — re-enable to restore them to whatever you set last.

contracts.title: Contracts
contracts.description: Compose contracts from a library of reusable blocks (image rights, NDA, model release, cancellation, jurisdiction…) and have customers sign in-browser or upload a wet-signed PDF. Seeded block bodies are EXAMPLES ONLY — review with your lawyer before sending.

crmDevelopment.title: CRM developer tools
crmDevelopment.description: Internal helpers for verifying CRM flows (e.g. fire the admin payment-check email instantly, bypass throttles). Surfaces as a "Development" sub-tab under Clients. Strictly opt-in — fires real side effects, use against test data only.

hoursLogging.title: Hours logging
hoursLogging.description: Per-customer time tracking. Admin logs date + start/end times + optional rate override + note. Monthly-mode customers auto-accumulate hours into the running monthly draft; per-event customers see a "Create draft invoice" button that mints a standalone draft invoice with one line per entry. Independent of Bills — log hours even before turning the full billing surface on.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Admin-only grouping layer above events. Bundle several events under one project and open a 360° Project Overview cockpit — milestone timeline plus a dated feed of every email (with the actual sent preview + resend/cancel/retry actions), quote, contract, invoice, gallery and logged hour. Adds a "book to project" control when logging hours. Customers never see projects.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Deliver the gallery-ready notification via WhatsApp Business API in addition to email. Requires a Meta Business Account, an approved message template, and a customer phone number on the event. Configure credentials under Settings → WhatsApp.

customerSurface.brandingHint: Controls what shows in the header of /customer/dashboard. Public galleries and admin surfaces are not affected.
customerSurface.showLogoHint: Uses the same branding logo configured above.
customerSurface.showCompanyName: Show company name in customer header
customerSurface.showCompanyNameHint: Hide if your logo already includes the company name.

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.subtitle: Default rates, VAT settings and the proof requirement.
accounting.kmRateHint: Default applied to mileage expenses; overridable per entry.
accounting.perDiemRateHint: A flat daily allowance booked as an expense (not a client billing rate); overridable per entry.
accounting.requireProof: Require a proof file on every expense

vat.title: VAT
vat.registered: VAT-registered (charge output VAT + reclaim input VAT)
vat.registeredHint: Off = small business / under threshold: no VAT charged, input VAT is a cost (not reclaimable).
vat.reclaimCountries: Countries where input VAT is reclaimable
vat.reclaimCountriesHint: Typically your domestic country (CH / LI). Costs from other countries are treated as non-reclaimable foreign VAT. Cmd/Ctrl-click to multi-select.
vat.defaultOutputCode: Default VAT code for new invoices
vat.defaultOutputCodeHint: New invoices and quotes start with this VAT code selected. Existing documents are unaffected.

accounting.disclaimer: Rates and VAT/tax treatment are guidance only — verify with your Treuhänder.

profileFields.vatLabelHint: Printed as the VAT-line label on invoice / quote PDFs. Leave blank to use the document language default.
profileFields.hourlyRateHint: Billing fallback used when a customer has no own rate (hours logging). In {{currency}}, major units. Leave blank to require a per-customer or per-entry rate.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.subtitle: Configure Meta Business credentials to deliver the gallery-ready notification via WhatsApp alongside email.
whatsapp.phoneNumberIdHint: From Meta Business → WhatsApp → API Setup. The numeric ID Meta assigns to the phone you registered.
whatsapp.wabaIdHint: WhatsApp Business Account ID. Reference only (the API call uses the Phone Number ID); helpful for auditing.
whatsapp.accessTokenHint: Stored masked as "********" on GET. Leave the masked value to keep the existing token; type a new one to replace it.
whatsapp.templateNameHint: Name of the Meta-approved message template. The default `gallery_ready` expects 5 body parameters: customer name, event name, gallery link, password line, expiry date. Approve the template in Meta Business Manager before enabling.
whatsapp.testHelp: Sends a static template message to the phone number below to verify Meta credentials + template approval. Includes country code (e.g. +49…).

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.subtitle: Track gallery performance and visitor engagement
analytics.configureInstructions: To see real analytics data, configure Umami in your environment variables and admin panel settings.

branding.title: Branding & Themes
branding.subtitle: Customize the look and feel of your galleries
branding.companyNameHelp: Displayed in gallery headers and emails
branding.companyTaglineHelp: A short description of your business
branding.logoDarkHelp: Optional. Shown on dark themes / dark mode; falls back to the main logo when unset.
branding.faviconHelp: PNG, ICO, or SVG format. Use a square image — an SVG (or a 512×512px PNG) gives the crispest display on high-resolution screens; smaller sizes work too.
branding.watermarkHelp: Add your company name as a watermark on downloaded photos
branding.colorModeHelp: Auto follows the visitor's system preference.
branding.eventThemesInfo: You can override these global theme settings for individual events when creating or editing them.

masonryModeHint.columns: Pinterest-style vertical columns with varied heights
masonryModeHint.justified: Google Photos-style rows using Knuth-Plass algorithm for optimal breaks

branding.targetRowHeightHint: Height in pixels (150-400). Photos will scale to fit rows.
branding.thumbnailScaleHint: Adjusts column count relative to the base grid columns
branding.customCSSHelp: Advanced: Add custom CSS to further customize the appearance

cssInstructions.title: How to use Custom CSS
cssInstructions.variablesDesc: Use these CSS variables to match your theme presets:
cssInstructions.layoutsDesc: Target gallery elements with these selectors:
cssInstructions.tipText: Use CSS Templates from Settings > CSS Templates for pre-built designs like Apple Liquid Glass.

branding.pdfTypographyHelp: Used for invoice + quote letterheads. Pick one of the bundled fonts, or leave on default to use Helvetica.
branding.heroPlaceholderText: Your event's hero photo will appear here
branding.hidePoweredByHelp: Remove the PicPeak attribution from gallery footers for a fully white-labeled experience
branding.logoMaxHeightHelp: Set a custom maximum height for the logo (20-200 pixels)
branding.positionSidepanelHelp: The logo appears in the admin sidebar instead of the header. When the sidebar is collapsed, the favicon is shown.
branding.showLogoInHeaderHelp: Display the logo in the main header bar
branding.showLogoInHeroHelp: Display the logo in hero sections (for non-grid layouts)
branding.headerStyleDescription: Choose how the gallery header appears. The header style is independent of the photo layout.
branding.heroDividerDescription: Choose how the transition between the hero image and gallery content looks.
branding.controlsStyleDescription: Choose how gallery filters and controls are displayed.

controlsStyleDescriptions.sidebar: Menu button opens sidebar with filters

branding.controlsStyleHeroWarning: Sidebar is recommended for hero headers to prevent controls appearing above the hero image.
branding.betaThumbnailWarningText: Your thumbnails are currently {{width}}×{{height}}px. Beta themes display photos at larger sizes and require at least {{recommended}}×{{recommended}}px for good quality. Increase the thumbnail dimensions in Settings > Thumbnails and regenerate.
branding.forceColorModeHelp: Lock the entire admin and public site to dark or light. The user-facing dark/light toggle is hidden whenever a lock is active. Per-event themes that try to override the colour mode are also forced to follow.
branding.forcedModeBrandingHint: Light/dark is locked site-wide by the Force control below — the per-theme mode picker is hidden because it would have no effect.
branding.forcedModeGalleryNote: A site-wide color lock is active, so this gallery follows the locked light/dark mode. Color and light/dark options are hidden here and can’t be overridden per gallery.
branding.colorGroupSurfacesHelp: The neutral layers behind your content. Background sits furthest back; Surface and Elevated stack on top.
branding.backgroundColorHelp: The page itself — body background of every gallery, admin page and CMS page.
branding.surfaceColorHelp: Cards, sidebar, header bar and navigation. The first layer above Background.
branding.elevatedColorHelp: Panels that float above cards: image placeholders, hover/active rows, modal headers, code blocks.
branding.borderColorHelp: Dividers, table grid lines, card outlines, input borders.
branding.colorGroupTextHelp: Foreground text colours. Primary is for everything readers focus on; Secondary is for supporting copy.
branding.textColorHelp: Headlines, body copy, table cells, form input values, navigation labels — the main text colour.
branding.mutedTextColorHelp: Captions, helper text under inputs, table column headers, footer links, dates and metadata.
branding.colorGroupAccentHelp: Brand colours that highlight interactive elements. Use a strong colour pair — Accent is for outlines/text, Accent Dark is for filled buttons.
branding.accentColorHelp: Links, icons, focus rings, hover states on primary buttons, active sidebar item underline. Should read clearly on both Background and Surface.
branding.accentDarkColorHelp: Filled CTA buttons, active sidebar item background, badges and tags. Needs enough contrast for white text to be readable on top.
branding.cssTemplateDescription: Select a pre-built CSS template to apply application-wide styling to this gallery. Templates can be managed in Settings > CSS Templates.
branding.noTemplateDescription: Use only theme settings without a CSS template

layoutDescriptions.grid: Classic grid layout with consistent photo sizes
layoutDescriptions.gallery-premium: Elegant light theme with hero and masonry (Beta)
layoutDescriptions.gallery-story: Cinematic dark theme with scene sections (Beta)

headerStyleDescriptions.hero: Full-height image with event info overlay
headerStyleDescriptions.standard: Compact inline header with event details
headerStyleDescriptions.banner: Standard header plus a colored banner above

loginLogo.title: Login pages logo
loginLogo.subtitle: Controls only /admin/login and /customer/login. Gallery and admin chrome use the logo settings above.
loginLogo.frame: Show tinted frame behind the logo
loginLogo.frameHelp: When off, the logo sits directly on the page background. Useful for logos that already include their own backdrop.

admin.title: Admin Panel

notificationMessages.adminPasswordResetByAdmin: Admin password reset by another admin: {{username}}
notificationMessages.hourEntryLoggedToMonthlyDraft: Hour entry logged to monthly draft

admin.dashboardSubtitle: Welcome back! Here's what's happening with your galleries.
admin.noEventsExpiring: No events expiring in the next 7 days

aggregate.description: Photos sorted by how many distinct guests liked or favorited them.

guests.forgetGuestConfirm: Remove this guest? Their picks will be anonymized but kept in aggregate totals.
guests.mergeSelectAtLeastTwo: Select at least 2 guests to merge
guests.mergeConfirm_one: Merge {{count}} guests into {{name}}? This cannot be undone.
guests.mergeConfirm_other: Merge {{count}} guests into {{name}}? This cannot be undone.
guests.title: Guests

activities.guest_feedback_comment: Guest commented on a photo in {{eventName}}
activities.external_import_completed: External media import completed ({{imported}} imported, {{skipped}} skipped)
activities.admin_password_reset: Admin password reset by another admin: {{username}}
activities.hour_entry_logged_to_monthly_draft: Hour entry logged to monthly draft

acceptInvitation.title: Accept Invitation
acceptInvitation.subtitle: Create your admin account
acceptInvitation.invalidTokenMessage: This invitation link is invalid or has expired. Please contact your administrator for a new invitation.
acceptInvitation.alreadyUsedMessage: This invitation has already been used to create an account.
acceptInvitation.usernameHelp: 3-50 characters, letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens only
acceptInvitation.successMessage: Your account has been created successfully. You can now log in with your credentials.
acceptInvitation.contactAdminMessage: Please contact your administrator to request a new invitation.

errors.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.usernameTooLong: Username must be at most 50 characters
errors.usernameInvalid: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
errors.genericError: Failed to create account. Please try again.

errors.galleryNotFoundMessage: This gallery does not exist or has been removed.
errors.unexpectedError: We encountered an unexpected error. Don't worry, your data is safe.
errors.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields
errors.enterTestEmail: Please enter a test email address

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.expirationRange: Expiration must be between 1 and 365 days
validation.passwordTooSimple: Password cannot be just numbers. Consider using a date format like "04.07.2025"

toast.brandingThemeMissing: No branding theme has been saved yet.

email.title: Email Configuration
email.subtitle: Configure email settings for notifications
email.ensureFirewall: Ensure your firewall allows outbound SMTP
email.gmailAppPassword: For Gmail, use an app-specific password

flushQueue.title: Send queued emails now
flushQueue.help: Immediately send every pending email, ignoring the business-hours schedule. Useful for draining the queue before maintenance or updates.

incoming.title: Incoming mail (IMAP)
incoming.subtitle: A dedicated mailbox polled every minute; attachments land in Accounting → Incoming invoices.
incoming.roundTripHint: Sends a test email via your SMTP settings to this mailbox and confirms it arrives. Save both first.
incoming.pollHint: Check the mailbox now instead of waiting for the 60-second poll. Ingests unread attachments into Incoming invoices.
incoming.pollDisabled: Incoming mail is turned off — enable it under Settings → Features.
incoming.pollUnconfigured: Save the incoming mail settings first.
incoming.pollBusy: A poll is already running — try again in a moment.
incoming.folderHint: Enter host, username and password, then Detect to list the mailbox folders.
incoming.noFolders: No folders returned by the server.
incoming.requiredFields: Host, port and username are required.

received.subject: Subject
received.empty: No received emails yet. Enable incoming mail and configure the mailbox.

sentEmails.title: Sent emails
sentEmails.subtitle: Delivery status of every queued and sent notification.

email.ignoreSslWarning: Warning: Disabling certificate verification makes the connection vulnerable to man-in-the-middle attacks. Only enable this if you trust the SMTP server and understand the security implications.
email.brandingDescription: Customize the colors used in email templates. Changes apply to the header bar, buttons, links, and footer background.
email.noTranslationYet: No translation exists for this language yet. Copy from an existing language to get started:
email.syncedFromBranding: Email colours synced from Branding. Click Save to apply.
email.primaryColorHelp: Header bar, H2 headings, button background, link colour. Maps to Branding → Accent (filled).
email.secondaryColorHelp: Footer bar background. Maps to Branding → Surface.
email.bodyBgColorHelp: The wrapper around the email card — what the recipient sees behind the email itself. Maps to Branding → Background.
email.containerBgColorHelp: The white card that holds the email content. Maps to Branding → Surface.
email.listBgColorHelp: Background of the bulleted info panels inside the email body. Maps to Branding → Elevated.
email.bodyTextColorHelp: Paragraph and bold text colour. Maps to Branding → Primary text.
email.mutedTextColorHelp: Footer text and copyright line. Maps to Branding → Secondary text.
email.buttonTextColorHelp: Text colour on filled buttons. Should contrast cleanly against the Primary colour. No Branding equivalent — usually white.
email.featureOffTooltip: The feature this template belongs to is currently disabled. You can still edit the template — it will be used once the feature is re-enabled.

cms.title: CMS Pages
cms.subtitle: Manage legal and informational pages
cms.useExternalUrlHelp: Redirect visitors to an external page instead of showing the internal content. The internal title and content stay saved as a fallback.
cms.externalUrlInvalid: Must be a valid https:// URL
cms.externalUrlActive: External URL is active — internal content is preserved but not shown to visitors.
cms.pageLogoHelp: Optional. If set, used in place of the global branding logo on this page.

eventTypes.title: Event Types
eventTypes.subtitle: Customize event types and their default themes

validation.slugFormat: Only letters, numbers, and hyphens allowed

slugInfo.title: URL Prefix Info:
slugInfo.description: The URL prefix is used to generate gallery URLs. For example, an event type with prefix "family" will create URLs like: family-smith-family-2025-01-22

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Event Type
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete
deleteConfirm.warning: This action cannot be undone. Make sure no events are using this type.

backup.title: Backup Management
backup.subtitle: Manage system backups, configure automated backups, and restore from previous backups.

integrity.title: Document integrity
integrity.description: Verifies every CRM document (quote / contract / invoice / signature) referenced from the database actually exists on disk and — where a hash is stored — its bytes still match. Read-only, on-demand.
integrity.emptyState: No check has been run yet in this session. Click "Run check now" to scan the document estate.

summary.existsButNoHashHint: File found, but no SHA-256 is stored for it (quote/invoice PDFs, signature drawings). Existence-only is weaker evidence in a dispute.

missing.heading: Missing files
missing.caption: These rows reference a path that does not exist on disk. After a restore, this means the artefact was lost from the backup chain; for fresh installs, it usually means the file was deleted manually.

hashMismatches.heading: Hash mismatches
hashMismatches.caption: The file exists but its current bytes do not match the SHA-256 captured at issue / sign time. Indicates tampering, bit-rot, or a restore that pulled in a different copy than the original.

coverage.title: Backup coverage
coverage.description: Shows what the next backup will include, skip, or silently miss. The database block confirms the dump strategy. The "drift" section flags subdirectories that exist on disk but are not in the backup configuration — usually a sign that a new feature shipped without a matching backup_paths row.
coverage.fallbackInUse: The backup_paths table is missing. The walker is using its legacy hard-coded fallback. Migration 108 may not have run — check server logs and re-run migrations.

drift.heading: Drift detected: subdirectories not covered by any backup_paths row
drift.caption: These directories exist on disk but the walker will skip them. Either add a backup_paths row, move the files into a covered location, or — if they are runtime caches — confirm they are safe to exclude.
drift.none: No drift detected — every top-level subdirectory under STORAGE_PATH is either in backup_paths or in the expected non-backup allow-list.

notConfigured.title: Backup Not Configured
notConfigured.message: Please configure backup settings in the Configuration tab before running backups.

configuration.enableBackupHelp: Automatically create backups according to the configured schedule

local.name: Local Storage
local.description: Store backups on the local server filesystem

rsync.name: Remote Server (Rsync)
rsync.description: Sync backups to a remote server via SSH/Rsync

s3.name: S3 Compatible Storage
s3.description: Store backups in Amazon S3 or compatible object storage

fields.destinationPathHelp: Local directory path for storing backups

schedule.title: Backup Schedule
schedule.retentionHelp: days (older backups will be automatically deleted)

whatToBackup.title: What to Backup
whatToBackup.databaseHelp: All event data, settings, and configurations
whatToBackup.photosHelp: All uploaded photos in active galleries

advancedOptions.title: Advanced Options
advancedOptions.compressionHelp: Compress backup files to save storage space

messages.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields

source.title: Select Backup Source
source.subtitle: Choose where to restore the backup from

backup.title: Choose Backup to Restore
backup.subtitle: Select from available backups
backup.noBackupsFound: No backups found in selected source
backup.encryptedMessage: You'll need to provide the encryption passphrase to restore this backup.

full.name: Full Restore
full.description: Restore everything including database, photos, and archives
full.warning: This will replace all current data

database.name: Database Only
database.description: Restore only the database (settings, events, users)

selective.name: Selective Restore
selective.warning: Only selected items will be restored

additionalOptions.title: Additional Options
additionalOptions.skipPreBackupHelp: By default, a backup is created before restore. Check this to skip it.
additionalOptions.forceHelp: Override safety checks and warnings (use with caution)

warning.title: Important Notice
warning.message: This restore operation will replace existing data. Make sure you have a current backup before proceeding. This action cannot be undone.

success.title: Restore Completed Successfully
success.message: Your data has been restored. Please verify everything is working correctly.

cssTemplates.title: Custom CSS Templates
cssTemplates.enableHint: Enabled templates can be selected when creating events
cssTemplates.cssHint: Use .gallery-page to scope styles to the gallery. Available variables: --gallery-bg, --gallery-text, --gallery-accent
cssTemplates.securityText: CSS is sanitized to prevent malicious code. External URLs, @import, and JavaScript expressions are blocked.
cssTemplates.resetConfirm: Reset this template to the default? Your changes will be lost.
cssTemplates.sanitizationWarning: Some CSS patterns were blocked for security

maintenance.title: System Maintenance
maintenance.message: We're currently performing scheduled maintenance to improve our service. We'll be back online shortly.

passwordChange.title: Change Password
passwordChange.mustDiffer: Must be different from current password
passwordChange.minLengthError: Password must be at least 6 characters
passwordChange.mustBeDifferent: New password must be different from current password

mandatoryPasswordChange.title: Password Change Required
mandatoryPasswordChange.description: For security reasons, you must change your password before accessing the admin panel.
mandatoryPasswordChange.success: Password changed successfully! You can now access the admin panel.
mandatoryPasswordChange.mustContainUpperLower: Must contain uppercase and lowercase letters
mandatoryPasswordChange.minLengthError: Password must be at least 12 characters

passwordGenerator.patternDescription: Passwords are generated using your event name and date. Example: "Venue2024$August" for better security and memorability.

feedback.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first to comment!

settings.title: Guest Feedback Settings
settings.ratingsDesc: Allow guests to rate photos (1-5 stars)
settings.identityModeSimpleDesc: Anonymous, device-based. All visitors on the same device share state.
settings.identityModeGuestDesc: Each visitor enters their name. Enables per-guest tracking and admin insights.
settings.requireInfoDesc: Guests must provide name and email to leave feedback
settings.moderateCommentsDesc: Comments require approval before being visible
settings.showToGuestsDesc: Other guests can see ratings, likes, and approved comments
settings.rateLimitingDesc: Prevent spam by limiting feedback frequency

feedback.title: Feedback Management
feedback.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this feedback?
feedback.wordFiltersDesc: Manage blocked words for comment moderation
feedback.identityReason: Please provide your name and email to submit {{type}}.

adminLogin.title: Admin Login
adminLogin.subtitle: Sign in to manage your photo galleries
adminLogin.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
adminLogin.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
adminLogin.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
adminLogin.tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
adminLogin.generalError: An error occurred. Please try again.
adminLogin.devModeHint: Development Mode: Use email: admin@example.com, password: admin123

clientAccess.title: Client Access
clientAccess.description: Review photos and manage visibility before the gallery is shared with guests.
clientAccess.enableDescription: Allow clients to review and hide photos before the gallery is shared with guests.
clientAccess.pinHelperText: The client will use this PIN to access the review page.

export.hint: Select photos or apply filters to export

preview.helpTxt: Paste into Lightroom's filename search. The list is comma-separated with no extension so it matches a catalog that holds RAW files.
preview.helpCsv: Paste into a spreadsheet (Google Sheets, Excel, Numbers) — the first row is the column header.
preview.copyFailed: Clipboard write blocked. Select the text and copy manually.

photos.moveToCategoryFailed: Failed to move photos to category

login.title: Customer login
login.subtitle: Access all of your photo galleries in one place.
login.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts — please try again later.
login.networkError: Could not reach the server. Please try again.
login.adminHint: Looking for the admin panel? Visit /admin/login.

acceptInvite.title: Set up your account
acceptInvite.invalidToken: This invitation link is invalid or has expired. Please contact your photographer for a new invitation.
acceptInvite.name: Your name
acceptInvite.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
acceptInvite.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, with one uppercase letter and one number.
acceptInvite.alreadyExists: An account with this email already exists. Please log in instead.
acceptInvite.generalError: Could not create your account. Please try again.
acceptInvite.subtitle: Confirm or fill in your details. You can edit anything from the profile page later.

dashboard.title: Your galleries
dashboard.subtitle: Click a gallery to open it. The Download button bundles every photo as a zip.
dashboard.loadError: Could not load your galleries. Please try again.
dashboard.emptyBody: Once your photographer assigns you to a gallery, it will appear here.
dashboard.eventForbidden: You no longer have access to this gallery.
dashboard.openError: Could not open this gallery. Please try again.
dashboard.downloadError: Could not start the download. Please try again.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.body: Upcoming sessions, gallery delivery dates, and other shoot-related events will land here. We'll let you know when it's ready.

quotes.title: Quotes
quotes.subtitle: Every quote your photographer has sent you. Click an open quote to accept or decline.
quotes.disabled: This feature is currently disabled for your account. Please contact your photographer if you expected to see quotes here.
quotes.popupBlocked: Allow pop-ups for this site to view the quote PDF.

bills.title: Invoices
bills.subtitle: Every invoice your photographer has sent you. Click "View PDF" to download.
bills.disabled: This feature is currently disabled for your account. Please contact your photographer if you expected to see invoices here.
bills.popupBlocked: Allow pop-ups for this site to view the invoice PDF.

profile.title: Customer profile
profile.subtitle: Keep your contact and billing details up to date — they're shown on quotes and invoices once those features go live.

field.emailHint: Contact your photographer if you need to change your login email.
field.displayNameHint: How we greet you in the dashboard.

password.hint: At least 8 characters with one uppercase letter and one number.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please ask your photographer to send a new one.
resetPassword.hint: At least 8 characters with one uppercase letter and one number.
resetPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.generalError: Could not update your password. Please try again.

field.hourlyRateHint: Major units (e.g. 150.00 for {{currency}} 150). Leave blank to require a per-entry override on every block.

hours.monthlyHint: Entries auto-append to the current monthly draft. Edit / delete remains possible until the scheduler arms the draft for send.
hours.perEventHint: Logged entries stay unbilled until you click "Create draft invoice" — one scheduled invoice is generated with a line per entry and opened in the editor, so you can add other items before it ships.

form.title: Log new entry
form.durationHint: Type a duration to auto-fill End: 1h, 1.5, 1,5 or 1:30
form.needRate: Set a rate or enter an override to log time.

hours.confirmDelete: Delete this entry? If it has been billed onto a draft, the matching invoice line will also be removed.
hours.locked: Locked: invoice already armed for send

noRate.title: No hourly rate configured
noRate.body: Logging needs a rate. Set one for this customer, type a per-entry override below, or configure an install-wide default.
noRate.setForCustomer: Set a rate for this customer

error.noRate: No hourly rate set for this customer. Enter a rate override, set a rate on the customer, or configure an install-wide default in Settings.

create.title: Create new customer
create.subtitle: Fill in the details below. Choose "Save as passive customer" to create an admin-only record, or "Save & send portal invitation" to also email the customer a sign-up link.
create.passiveSubtitle: Adds an admin-only customer record. The customer is not notified and cannot log in until you send them an invitation later.
create.savedActiveToast: Customer created and portal invitation sent.
create.inviteFailedToast: Customer saved (passive). Invitation email failed — retry from the customer detail page.
create.nameRequired: Enter at least a company name or a contact name.

passive.alreadyActive: Customer already has portal access — no invitation needed.
passive.detailHint: This customer has no portal access (admin-only record). Click below to email them a portal sign-up link. The customer's existing invoices, quotes, and gallery assignments are preserved when they claim the invitation.
passive.deactivatedHint: Reactivate the customer before sending the invitation.

customers.pageSubtitle: Recurring customer accounts that can log in at /customer/login.
customers.empty: No customers yet. Click "Invite customer" to add one.

search.placeholder: Search by email, name, or company

invite.title: Invite a customer
invite.description: They will receive an email with a link to set up their account. Once they have accepted, you can assign them to events.
invite.conflict: A customer with this email already exists or has a pending invitation.
invite.prefillHint: Anything you fill in will be pre-populated on the customer's sign-up page — they can still edit it.

deactivate.title: Deactivate customer?
deactivate.body: They will no longer be able to log in. You can re-invite them later.

cancelInvitation.title: Cancel invitation?
cancelInvitation.body: The invitation link will stop working immediately.

detail.emailConflict: That email is already in use by another customer.
detail.noEvents: Not assigned to any events yet. Add this customer to an event from the event form.
detail.preferredLanguageHint: Drives portal UI and quote/invoice PDF locale. New customers default to the business-profile language ({{lang}}); override here per customer.
detail.notesHint: Visible only to admins. Never shown to the customer.
detail.featuresHint: Per-customer overrides for the customer-surface tabs. The global toggles in Settings → Customer Surface are the master switch — when global is OFF nobody sees the tab, regardless of what you set here. Defaults are ON, so flip a switch OFF to hide a tab for this specific customer.
detail.passwordHint: Sends a 7-day single-use reset link to the customer's email. The customer's current password keeps working until they click the link and set a new one.

passwordReset.inactive: Reactivate the customer before sending a reset.

detail.noQuotes: No quotes for this customer yet.
detail.noContracts: No contracts for this customer yet.
detail.noBills: No invoices for this customer yet.

billing.hint: Per-event (default): every invoice is sent on its own schedule. Monthly: all invoices issued in the period accumulate into one bill that fires on the configured day. Manual: items accumulate the same way, but the bill ships only when you trigger it.
billing.cycleDayHint: 1..28 = day of month. Use negative -1..-15 for "N days before month end" (so -3 fires on the 28th of a 31-day month).
billing.skontoDisabledHint: Disables the early-payment discount on all of this customer’s invoices, regardless of template or global defaults.
billing.triggerConfirm: Issue this customer's monthly bill now? The customer receives the email immediately.
billing.triggerConfirmManual: Issue this customer's accumulated bill now? The customer receives the email immediately.
billing.triggerHint: Bypasses the cadence day and issues the running draft immediately. Refuses when nothing has been queued for the current period.
billing.triggerHintManual: Issues the running draft immediately. Manual-cadence drafts never ship automatically — this is the only way to send them. Refuses when nothing has been queued.
billing.triggerError: Could not trigger the monthly bill.

erase.title: Erase customer data?
erase.body: Removes the customer's name, email, phone, address, company and credentials. The account row stays so historical event-access records and audit logs still reference it. This is irreversible — you cannot restore the data afterwards.

assignedEvents.title: Manage assigned galleries
assignedEvents.subtitle: Pick every gallery this customer should be able to access from their dashboard. Removing a gallery here revokes access immediately on the customer's next request.
assignedEvents.empty: No galleries assigned yet. Search below to add one.

clients.title: CRM
clients.subtitle: Customer accounts, scheduling, quotes and billing — everything for recurring clients in one place.

empty.title: No CRM features enabled
empty.body: Enable Accounts (or another CRM sub-feature) under Settings → Features to get started.

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.subtitle: Inbound supplier invoices, expenses and reporting.

empty.title: No accounting features enabled
empty.body: Enable the Tax report (or another accounting sub-feature) under Settings → Features to get started.

help.rebill: Your own supplier cost that you invoice on to a client — usually with a markup. Booked as both a cost and re-billed revenue.
help.durchlaufend: An amount you only front on behalf of a client and pass through at the exact figure — no markup, VAT-neutral (durchlaufender Posten). Attach the client to re-bill it at cost.
help.eigener_aufwand: Your own cost, not re-billed to anyone. Pick a category so it lands in the right place in your P&L.
help.duplikat: A duplicate of an invoice you already captured — excluded from the books.
help.abgelehnt: Decline this document — excluded from the books.

inbox.captureBody: Photograph a paper invoice with your device camera, or upload a PDF / image.
inbox.empty: No documents yet — capture one above.
inbox.rebillHint: Creates an editable scheduled invoice on the client. VAT/tax handling is v1 — verify with your Treuhänder.
inbox.previewError: Preview unavailable — enter the fields manually.
inbox.qrHint: Showing the last page — the Swiss QR-bill usually sits at the bottom.

field.passthroughCustomerHint: Optional — attach a client to re-bill this passthrough; leave empty to only book it to the event.
field.supplierCountryHint: Sets the tax treatment automatically: outside your VAT-reclaim countries → foreign VAT (not reclaimable).

booking.label: Book to
booking.inboundHint: Which event carries this cost in your reports & tax export (Company = general overhead). This is separate from who you re-bill it to.

incoming.pendingBody: Categorized invoices waiting to be re-billed. Bundle a client’s items into one invoice.

expense.rateDefault: Default {{rate}} — leave blank to use it
expense.proofExisting: A proof file is already attached — upload a new one to replace it.

ledger.empty: No expenses yet — add one above.
ledger.invoiceHint: This creates a billable line on the client’s next scheduled invoice and locks the expense from further edits.
ledger.lockedHint: Locked — this expense is on a client invoice.

projects.title: Project Overview
projects.subtitle: Group events into projects and see every email, document, gallery and hour in one cockpit.
projects.empty: No projects yet. Create one above, or events you already have were grouped automatically.

events.title: Events
events.none: No events grouped under this project yet.
events.searchPlaceholder: Attach an event — search by name…

feed.title: Activity
feed.empty: Nothing rolled up to this project yet.

email.noPreview: No stored preview for this email — it was sent before previews were captured.
email.reRendered: Re-rendered from the current template — this email was sent before previews were captured, so it may differ slightly from what the recipient received.

error.customerMismatch: That belongs to a different customer than this project.

calendar.subtitle: Events, logged hours, and pending quotes/contracts in one view.

hourEntry.confirmDelete: Delete these logged hours? This cannot be undone.
hourEntry.lockedTooltip: Already billed — Storno the invoice to edit.

hoursLogging.title: Hours logging
hoursLogging.subtitle: Pick a customer and log billable time blocks. Entries flow into the next monthly bill or are billed on demand for per-event customers.
hoursLogging.emptyList: No customers have hours logging enabled yet. Flip "Hours logging" on a customer's detail page first.
hoursLogging.customerLoggingDisabled: This customer has hour logging disabled. Enable it on the customer's detail page to log hours.

openHours.title: Open hours across all customers
openHours.subtitle: Unbilled time blocks waiting to be billed. Pick a customer above, or click a row to drill in.
openHours.empty: No unbilled hours right now — everything is billed or no time has been logged yet.

crmDev.title: CRM Development
crmDev.subtitle: Internal tools for verifying CRM flows. Hidden by default — enabled via Settings → Features → Development.
crmDev.warning: These tools fire real side effects (emails, status changes). Use against test data.

envDisabled.title: Dev tools blocked by env gate
envDisabled.body: Set PICPEAK_ENABLE_DEV_TOOLS=1 in your backend env file and restart the server. The feature flag alone is not enough — this is a deliberate production-safety guard.
envDisabled.cardHint: Email templates can't be listed until the dev-tools env gate is opened.

paymentCheck.title: Test payment-check email (real invoice)
paymentCheck.help: Fires the admin payment-check email for a real sent/overdue invoice, bypassing the 24h throttle. The three buttons in the email are real signed tokens — clicking them will affect the invoice status.
paymentCheck.noneAvailable: No sent or overdue invoices in the database.
paymentCheck.sentToast: Test email queued. Check the recipient's inbox.

templates.title: Send any CRM email to me (mock data)
templates.help: Queues the chosen template to your own admin email with placeholder values. When the install has a real quote / invoice on file, the appropriate PDF is attached so you can verify the full output.
templates.empty: No CRM email templates found — run migrations to seed them.

quote_sent.title: Quote sent (to customer)
quote_sent.description: Fires when a quote is sent — includes the PDF attachment + accept/decline links.

quote_accepted_customer.title: Quote accepted — customer confirmation
quote_accepted_customer.description: Sent to the customer after they (or the admin on their behalf) accept the quote. Includes PDF.

quote_accepted_admin.title: Quote accepted — admin notification
quote_accepted_admin.description: Notifies the admin that a quote was accepted by the customer.

quote_declined_admin.title: Quote declined — admin notification
quote_declined_admin.description: Notifies the admin that a quote was declined by the customer.

invoice_sent.title: Invoice sent (to customer)
invoice_sent.description: Fires when an invoice is sent — includes the PDF attachment.

invoice_reminder_first.title: Invoice reminder — first
invoice_reminder_first.description: First reminder to the customer. No late fee yet.

invoice_reminder_second.title: Invoice reminder — second (with Mahngebühr)
invoice_reminder_second.description: Second reminder with the late fee surcharge added.

invoice_payment_check_admin.title: Payment-check (admin)
invoice_payment_check_admin.description: Admin email with the three signed-token action buttons.

contract_sent.title: Contract sent (to customer)
contract_sent.description: Admin → customer send with the unsigned contract PDF attached.

contract_signed_admin_notification.title: Contract signed — admin notification
contract_signed_admin_notification.description: Customer-signed ping back to the admin. No attachment.

contract_fully_signed.title: Contract fully signed (dual-party)
contract_fully_signed.description: Dual-party send once both signatures are in. Stamped contract PDF attached.

event_reminder_default.title: Event reminder — default (catch-all)
event_reminder_default.description: Pre-event nudge used when no per-category template matches.

event_reminder_wedding.title: Event reminder — wedding
event_reminder_wedding.description: Pre-event nudge for events with event_type=wedding.

event_reminder_birthday.title: Event reminder — birthday
event_reminder_birthday.description: Pre-event nudge for events with event_type=birthday.

event_reminder_corporate.title: Event reminder — corporate
event_reminder_corporate.description: Pre-event nudge for events with event_type=corporate.

event_reminder_other.title: Event reminder — other
event_reminder_other.description: Pre-event nudge for events with event_type=other.

ledger.intro: Used only to produce the Treuhänder export — picpeak does not keep double-entry books. The seeded chart + VAT codes follow the Swiss/LI KMU-Kontenrahmen; adjust them to match your Treuhänder’s setup.

outputVatMap.title: VAT code by revenue rate
outputVatMap.empty: Add output VAT codes above to configure a code per revenue rate.

export.title: Treuhänder export
export.intro: Download the collective journal (revenue + costs as accrual postings with account and VAT codes) for import into your Treuhänder’s accounting software.
export.disclaimer: Accrual basis only (document dates) — payments/bank movements are not included. Account + VAT codes follow your Chart-of-accounts mapping. Always review the import with your Treuhänder before filing.

taxReport.title: Tax report
taxReport.intro: Period-scoped revenue list with net + VAT breakdown grouped by VAT rate. Cancelled invoices stay visible for audit-trail continuity but are excluded from totals.
taxReport.ledgerExportHint: Bookkeeping entries for your accountant, mapped via your Chart of accounts.

export.reportHint: Readable list — for your own records.

taxReport.cancelledFootnote: {{count}} cancelled invoice(s) — amounts excluded from totals (shown for audit-trail continuity).
taxReport.costsDisclaimer: This income/expense overview is a guideline for your records (Einnahmen-Ausgaben-Rechnung). VAT reclaimability and the result figure depend on each cost’s tax treatment — verify with your Treuhänder / tax authority before filing.

summary.title: Income / costs
summary.vatUnconfigured: VAT registration isn’t configured, so VAT payable can’t be computed. Set it under Settings → Accounting.

errors.popupBlocked: Allow pop-ups for this site to preview the PDF.
errors.customerFeatureDisabled: This customer has Quotes disabled. Enable Quotes on the customer detail page first.

quotes.confirmSend: Send this quote to the customer now?
quotes.confirmConvert: Convert this accepted quote into an event + scheduled invoices?
quotes.declineReasonPrompt: Mark this quote as declined on behalf of the customer? Optionally note why (leave blank to skip).
quotes.customerSearch: Search customer by email or company…
quotes.title: Quotes
quotes.subtitle: Send, track and convert quotes into events.

lineItems.empty: No line items yet — add one to get started.
lineItems.detailsPlaceholder: Optional notes — fine print, package inclusions, conditions…

bills.title: Invoices
bills.subtitle: Schedule, send, track payments and chase late invoices.

errors.popupBlocked: Allow pop-ups for this site to preview the PDF.

bills.confirmRelease: Mark the photos as delivered and send this invoice to the customer now?
bills.monthlyDraftBadge: Monthly draft — ships via the customer's cadence day or "Trigger invoice now"
bills.confirmCancelDraft: Cancel this draft invoice? No document goes out.
bills.confirmCancelIssued: A Stornorechnung will be generated and emailed to the customer immediately. This cannot be undone. Continue?
bills.cancelledWithStornoToast: Invoice cancelled — Stornorechnung issued to the customer.
bills.confirmReissue: A Stornorechnung will be issued to the customer for this invoice, and a new scheduled draft will be created with the same line items. The new invoice will reference this one as "Replaces R-XXXX". Continue?
bills.confirmReissueCancelled: Create a new scheduled invoice with the same line items, linked back to this cancelled one?
bills.reissuedToast: Invoice reissued — opening the new draft.
bills.reissuedWithStornoToast: Stornorechnung issued — opening the new draft.
bills.cancelledByStornoLabel: This invoice was cancelled by Stornorechnung

field.dueDateOverrideOn: Manual due date — untick to auto-set from send date + payment term
field.dueDateOverrideOff: Auto from send date + payment term — tick to set manually
field.bankAccountHelp: Overrides the profile default for this invoice only. Leave on default to inherit the currency-matched account from Settings → Business profile.
field.paymentTermHelp: Net days + Skonto for this invoice. Leave blank to inherit from the source quote or the global CRM defaults.
field.skontoDisabled: Disable Skonto for this invoice (suppresses the early-payment-discount block on the PDF and the "Paid with Skonto" buttons in the admin email / record-payment dialog).

bills.importHelp: Attach a PDF from a previous billing system. The customer sees this original document in their portal — picpeak does not regenerate it.

businessProfile.movedToAccounting: The VAT rate, VAT label and default hourly rate now live under Settings → Accounting.
businessProfile.title: Business profile
businessProfile.subtitle: Issuer block shown on every quote and invoice PDF.

businessHours.title: Business hours
businessHours.subtitle: Set opening hours per weekday — add a second block for a lunch break. Interpreted in the timezone above ({{tz}}).
businessHours.floorToggle: Hold scheduled emails until business hours
businessHours.floorToggleHelp: When on, an automated email scheduled outside the hours above is delivered at the next opening instead of at an odd hour. When off, scheduled emails send at their exact time.

crmSettings.title: CRM settings
crmSettings.subtitle: Fine-tune quote and invoice behaviour.
crmSettings.emptyState: No CRM features are currently enabled. Turn on Quotes, Invoices, or Contracts in Settings → Features to see the matching configuration here.

section.dashboardOverviewHint: Hide CRM overview tiles on the admin dashboard. All tiles render by default; uncheck to hide.

paymentDefaults.help: Pre-filled on every new quote and invoice. The editor still lets you pick a different combination per document.

installmentDefaults.help: Pre-fill the trigger for fresh rows in the Installments panel. Per-document edits override; existing documents keep their snapshotted plan.

crm_invoices_qr_enabled.label: Render payment QR on invoice PDFs

crm_invoices_reminders_enabled.label: Send automatic reminders for overdue invoices

crm_invoices_late_fee_enabled.label: Add a late fee on the second reminder

crm_quotes_tos_required.label: Require customers to tick "I accept the Terms of Service" before accepting

crm_quotes_tos_text.label: Inline Terms text shown on the quote page
crm_quotes_tos_text.placeholder: Paste the contract terms here. Plain text. Leave empty to only show the checkbox + URL.

crm_contracts_require_drawn_signature.label: Require drawn signature (typed name alone is not enough)

crm_contracts_allow_pdf_upload.label: Allow customer to upload a wet-signed PDF

crm_contracts_store_ip.label: Store signer's IP address (recommended — corroborating evidence in civil disputes)
crm_contracts_store_ip.help: When off, the customer's and admin's IP at signing time is NOT recorded into the contract row or the public sign-page audit confirmation. Per GDPR data-minimisation principle some operators prefer this — but IP is corroborating identity evidence if the contract is challenged, so we recommend keeping it on.

quoteResponse.notFoundBody: This link may have expired or been revoked. Please contact the photographer for a new quote.
quoteResponse.locked: Your response window has closed and the decision is now final.
quoteResponse.title: Quote
quoteResponse.acceptedLocked: You accepted this quote on {{date}}. The decision is final.
quoteResponse.declinedLocked: You declined this quote on {{date}}. The decision is final.
quoteResponse.cannotRespond: This quote can no longer be responded to via this link.
quoteResponse.changeWithin: You can change your response until {{at}}.
quoteResponse.intro: Please accept or decline this quote:

reminderTemplates.title: Pre-event reminder emails
reminderTemplates.globalHelp: Off by default — turn on to start sending pre-event reminders. The offset below is the default; each event can override on its detail page.
reminderTemplates.usesDefaultTooltip: No dedicated template yet — this event type falls back to the default. Edit + save here to create one.
reminderTemplates.willCreateOnSave: This event type uses the default template. The fields below are pre-filled from the default; saving will create a dedicated template for this event type.
reminderTemplates.variablesHint: Available variables: {{customer_name}}, {{event_name}}, {{event_date}}, {{event_type}}, {{days_before}}, {{business_name}} — substituted when the email is rendered.

eventReminderOverride.title: Pre-event reminder
eventReminderOverride.help: Per-event override for the customer reminder. Global on-off + default offset live under Settings → Reminder emails. Anything left blank here inherits the global setting / resolved template.
eventReminderOverride.disabledLabel: Disable the reminder for this event (no email goes out)
eventReminderOverride.offsetLabel: Days before the event (override) — leave blank to inherit
eventReminderOverride.offsetPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the global default
eventReminderOverride.bodyOverrideLabel: Custom body for this event (overrides the resolved template body)
eventReminderOverride.bodyOverridePlaceholder: Leave blank to use the template body. Variables like {{customer_name}}, {{event_name}}, {{event_date}} still work here.
eventReminderOverride.invalidOffset: Offset must be a non-negative integer or blank.

dealLineage.title: Related documents
dealLineage.empty: No other documents share this deal yet. New invoices, contracts, or installments will show up here once created.
dealLineage.editPlanHelp: Atomically reshape this plan: change percents, labels, triggers, add or remove rows. The plan total stays fixed; existing invoice numbers are kept where possible. Refused once any invoice has shipped.
dealLineage.editPlanWarning: Trimming rows deletes their invoice numbers (the sequence cannot release them — a §14 UStG continuity rule). Adding rows claims fresh numbers.
dealLineage.editPlanLocked: Plan can no longer be edited — at least one invoice has shipped or been cancelled.

installments.simpleHint: Each row fires on a specific date. Switch to dynamic triggers for plans tied to event date or delivery.
installments.advancedHint: Pick a trigger (quote accepted, before/after event, on delivery, fixed date) plus offset in days. Triggers re-resolve if the event date later shifts.
installments.label: Label
installments.onDeliveryHint: On delivery — admin releases manually. Switch to advanced to change.

contracts.title: Contracts
contracts.subtitle: Compose contracts from reusable blocks and have customers sign in-browser or upload a wet-signed PDF.

integrity.title: PDF integrity check
integrity.help: Re-hashes the unsigned + signed PDFs on disk and compares them to the SHA-256 stored when the document was issued. Catches backup corruption or manual edits since the customer received their copy.

detail.auditTrailHelp: Every event recorded on this contract. The list is append-only and is the source of truth if the contract is challenged.
detail.cancelConfirm: Cancel this contract? Customer signing link will be invalidated.
detail.confirmConvertEvent: Convert this contract into an event + scheduled invoices?
detail.confirmConvertInvoice: Convert this contract into invoice(s) only? No gallery / event will be created.
detail.confirmResendSigned: Re-send the signed contract PDF to both parties?
detail.countersignHelp: Type your name AND draw your signature below — both are stamped onto the re-rendered PDF. IP and timestamp are recorded for audit.
detail.noSignatureImage: No signature image captured — use "Re-stamp signatures" below to add one.
detail.popupBlocked: Allow pop-ups for this site to preview the PDF.
detail.renderFailedBody: The signature evidence is recorded, but the stamped PDF was not generated on the last attempt. Click "Re-send signed PDF" above to re-stamp from the original document and resend.
detail.renderFailedTitle: Signed PDF stamp failed — re-stamp required
detail.resentSignedToast: Signed contract re-sent to both parties.
detail.restampHelp: One or both signatures didn't capture an image. Draw the missing signature(s) here and we'll re-render the PDF. The typed names, timestamps, and IPs already on file stay untouched.

editor.disclaimerBody: The seeded block bodies are EXAMPLES ONLY — written by the maintainer, not by a lawyer. Have your own lawyer review every block you include before sending the contract. See docs/crm-disclaimers.md.
editor.eventHelp: Snapshotted onto the contract and propagated to any event / invoice generated from it. Set this so the customer portal and dunning emails show the right "Wedding Doe / Müller" label.
editor.locked: Sent contracts cannot be edited. Cancel and create a fresh one for amendments.
editor.noBlocksInSection: No blocks for this section yet.
editor.popupBlocked: Allow pop-ups for this site to preview the PDF.
editor.previewAfterSave: Save the draft first, then preview.
editor.schriftformWarning: Signature type: simple electronic signature (SES). Sufficient for routine photography contracts in CH / DE / AT / FL. NOT sufficient for documents that legally require Schriftform / form qualifiée: Bürgschaft (DE § 766 BGB), Verbraucherdarlehensvertrag (DE § 492 BGB), befristete Arbeitsverträge (DE § 14 Abs. 4 TzBfG), and similar. For those, a qualified electronic signature (QES) from a Trust Service Provider is required — picpeak does not provide QES.
